notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Samuel Basallo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Samuel Basallo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser grounds out to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser grounds into a force out, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez. Leody Taveras out at 2nd. Colton Cowser to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Orioles challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Gunnar Henderson reaches on a fielder's choice. Taylor Ward to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson to 2nd. Taylor Ward advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw singles on a line drive to left fielder Blaze Alexander.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Yohendrick Piñango walks. George Springer scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 3rd. Daulton Varsho to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: George Springer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: George Springer grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to second baseman Jackson Holliday to first baseman Pete Alonso. Brandon Valenzuela out at 2nd. George Springer out at 1st.
